{"id":"smallhold-086","title":"'smallhold init': bootstrap instance with config and DB","description":"Implement the init command: generate 32 random bytes as hex for secret_key, write config.toml skeleton with all sections from spec, create data directory, initialize SQLite database, run migrations. Print next-steps instructions.

Agent workflow: Spawn a subagent to test the init flow on a fresh temp directory end-to-end.

Test discipline:
- Test in a temp directory: run init, verify config.toml exists with all required sections
- Verify secret_key in written config is exactly 64 hex characters
- Verify database file is created and migrations ran (query sqlite_master)
- Test init on existing config: must prompt or error clearly (not silently overwrite)
- Test init with bad --data-dir (no write permission): must fail before writing any files

Defensive programming:
- Use rand::rngs::OsRng for secret_key generation (not rand::thread_rng())
- Atomic write: write config to temp file, then rename — never leave a half-written config
- Verify written config can be parsed back before reporting success","acceptance_criteria":"init in fresh dir creates valid config.toml and database; secret_key is 64 hex chars from OsRng; init on existing config prompts; partial failure leaves no corrupt files","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-04-23T00:27:26Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-04-23T00:27:26Z","metadata":{},"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-2eb","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T17:27:53Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
